title: potentilla fragaria var. micrantha
intro: Potentilla fragaria var. micrantha, commonly known as dwarf or small-leaf potentilla, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Potentilla fragaria var. micrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood sugar levels. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
